name: codemap
description: Persistent codebase knowledge graph plugin: builds and syncs .codemap/graph.json via pure-LLM extraction with parallel sub-agents. Workflows: task-codemap (build/sync), task-codemap-ask (Q&A), task-codemap-guide (guided walkthroughs), task-codemap-explain (structured deep-dive). Opt-in auto-update hook on git commit/merge/rebase. Depends only on core.
